EI premium rates and maximums

The following table shows the Employment Insurance (EI) premium rates and maximum insurable earnings for employees outside Quebec.

EI premium rates and maximums (outside Quebec)

insurable
earnings

premium

employee
premium

premium
rate (%)

annual
employer
premium 
definition : Maximum annual employer premium
2026 $68,900 1.63 $1,123.07 2.282 $1,572.30
2025 $65,700 1.66 $1,090.62 2.324 $1,526.87
2024 $63,200 1.66 $1,049.12 2.324 $1,468.77
